name: RDS deletion protection not enabled
description: RDS deletion protection is disabled. Without deletion protection, an authorised user (or compromised credential) can accidentally or maliciously delete the database and all its data permanently.
remediation: Enable deletion protection on all production RDS instances: aws rds modify-db-instance --db-instance-identifier <id> --deletion-protection. Apply SCP to prevent deletion-protection disablement in production accounts.
